title: api: remove use of deprecated/removed constants for `CNI` from buildah
body:
Following PR allows vendoring in latest buildah. Since some of the
essential constants were removed from buildah hence they cannot be
used any more. Use `c/common` instead.

Constants were removed in following PR: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3697

Unblocks buildah vendoring.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

@Luap99 Could you PTAL. I think some essentials are removed from buildah as part of refactor.
I will take care of it in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12642, buildah is still failing tests without https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3698
@Luap99 Thanks I'll close this in interest of #12642
